testcase.name: test_booking_full_flow
testcase.failure: tests/test_booking_system.py:170: in test_booking_full_flow assert booking_res.status_code == 200, f"Booking creation failed: {booking_res.text}" E AssertionError: Booking creation failed: {"detail":"Necesitas una suscripcion activa para hacer reservas"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_booking_reject_flow
testcase.failure: tests/test_booking_system.py:316: in test_booking_reject_flow assert booking_res.status_code == 200 E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_booking_cancel_flow
testcase.failure: tests/test_booking_system.py:411: in test_booking_cancel_flow booking_id = booking_res.json()["booking_id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'booking_id'

testcase.name: test_complete_pending_booking_fails
testcase.failure: tests/test_booking_system.py:510: in test_complete_pending_booking_fails booking_id = booking_res.json()["booking_id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'booking_id'

testcase.name: test_invalid_provider_and_pet

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 404 for invalid provider, got 403 assert 403 == 404 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_booking_system.py:586: in test_invalid_provider_and_pet assert res.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404 for invalid provider, got {res.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404 for invalid provider, got 403 E assert 403 == 404 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
